action_boundary: Should the relationship payment to Elara Advisory proceed today?
communication_boundary: Decide only from the attached control records. Risk status words are not enough by themselves; the active control chain determines the action boundary.

documents.text: Payment request REQ-ELR-201 asks to release USD 24750 to Elara Advisory for compliance advisory invoice INV-ELR-201 on 2026-07-03.
Screening record SCREEN-ELR-201 lists Elara Advisory principal M. Solen as a high-risk public-office match disclosed at onboarding.
Diligence file DIL-ELR-201 for Elara Advisory was reviewed on 2026-04-22 and remains inside the 12-month review cycle.
Senior risk authorization AUTH-ELR-201 for Elara Advisory payment activity was signed on 2025-04-24 by Banking Risk VP A. Tan.
Bank record BANK-ELR-201 binds Elara Advisory to account ending 6021 and invoice INV-ELR-201.
High-risk relationship payment release requires current diligence, senior risk authorization inside the 12-month review cycle, and exact payee-bank binding.
